description_long: This is a striking ring crafted from a metallic, likely bronze or brass, band with a rich, dark patina. The centerpiece is a large, faceted, deep green gemstone set in a raised bezel, flanked symmetrically by two smaller matching gemstones on either side. The gemstones are cut in a geometric, almost crystalline style, giving the ring a bold and modern appearance. The band is thick and sturdy, with a smooth, slightly rounded profile that suggests durability and comfort for the wearer. The overall design is both regal and contemporary, with the gemstones providing a vivid contrast to the warm metallic base. The ring's construction and materials suggest it is both decorative and robust, suitable for daily wear or as a statement piece.
description: A bold metallic ring with a large central green gemstone and two smaller matching side stones, set in a thick, dark metal band. The geometric gemstone cuts and sturdy band give it a modern, regal look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large central green gemstone flanked by two smaller side stones, all set in a thick, dark metallic band.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the central gemstone and one of the smaller side stones, with the band appearing thick and smooth.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the three gemstones visible and the band forming a complete circle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the central gemstone and the other side stone.
